product.name: ArSport Wp/Flame Pro
product.specLine: 160 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, Waterproof, Breathable, Flame Retardant Interlock Knit Fabric
descriptions: is humidity barrier fabric for firefighters suits.

It is flame retardant thus can be used on the inner layer of the firefighters cloth. The brethable membrane laminated to the fabric provides waterproof function. With very light and knit structure it is good alternative to woven humidty barrier fabrics.
160 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, Waterproof, Breathable, Flame Retardant Interlock Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane (PU) | TS EN ISO 1833
Dimensinal Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | TS EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
